goal: Enable an LLM to define schemas, query data, and integrate the ORM into Kuratchi apps.

d1.note: Lazy getter resolves binding at query time — ideal for module-level singletons

durable_object.note: Runs migrations automatically, returns ORM instance

fields.name: string — schema identifier
fields.version: number — schema version for migration tracking
fields.indexes: Record<string, Record<string, { columns, unique? }>> — table indexes

column_constraints: -> table.column cascade — FK with ON DELETE CASCADE
schema_dsl.mixin_syntax: '...mixinName': true — expands mixin columns into table

insert.notes: Fields not in schema are auto-skipped with warning

where_operators.comparison: { column: { gt, gte, lt, lte, ne, eq } }
where_operators.null_check: { column: { isNull: true } } or { column: { is: null } } or { column: { isNullish: true } }

chaining.sql: .sql({ query, params }) — raw SQL condition with ? placeholders
chaining.include: .include({ relatedTable: true | { foreignKey, localKey, as, table } })

sql_injection_protection: Template literals (${}) in .sql() throw an error
String concatenation detected throws an error
Always use ? placeholders and params array

json_columns.behavior: Auto JSON.stringify on insert/update, auto JSON.parse on select

soft_delete.behavior: Automatically filters out rows where deleted_at is set

include_relations.auto_detect: Looks for parentTable singularized + 'Id' column (e.g. categoryId)
include_relations.result: Adds related data as nested property on each row

migrations.d1: ORM generates CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS SQL from schema

process: Runs CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for all tables
ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN for missing columns on pre-existing tables
durable_object.note: Additive only — columns and tables can be added, not removed

example.orm: kuratchiOrmConfig({ databases: { DB: { schema: appSchema }, NOTES_DO: { schema: notesSchema, type: 'do' } } })

notes: DB key matches Wrangler D1 binding name
type: 'do' marks Durable Object SQLite database
Schema used for validation, migrations, and JSON handling

kuratchi_runtime.orm_in_do_files: this.db is the ORM instance in .do.ts function mode

custom_executor.usage: kuratchiORM({ adapter: 'executor', execute: async (sql, params) => ({ success: true, data: rows }) })

full_client.note: Native D1 client methods exposed through FullDbClient interface

rules: Define schema as SchemaDsl with name and version
Use kuratchiORM(() => env.DB) for module-level singletons
Use initDO(ctx.storage.sql, schema) in DO constructors
Always check result.success or use result.data
Use object syntax for where clauses, not SQL strings
Use .sql({ query, params }) with ? placeholders for raw SQL
Never use string interpolation in SQL
